OKITASABER-ALIENTO_POWER.title: Breath
OKITASABER-ALIENTO_POWER.description: #Your *Dash cards spend this. At the start of your turn, recover up to your maximum. If a *Dash drops it to 0, gain a *Cough.
OKITASABER-ALIENTO_POWER.smartDescriptio: #Your *Dash cards spend this. At the start of your turn, recover up to your maximum. If a *Dash drops it to 0, gain a *Cough.

OKITASABER-SWORD_GENIUS_POWER.title: Sword Genius
OKITASABER-MAKOTO_POWER.title: Makoto
OKITASABER-MAKOTO_POWER.description: #Each time your 100 *Critical *Star threshold triggers, your Attacks deal +2 more damage this combat, up to its cap.
OKITASABER-MAKOTO_POWER.smartDescription: #Each time your 100 *Critical *Star threshold triggers, your Attacks deal +2 more damage this combat, up to its cap.
OKITASABER-PRODIGY_SENSE_POWER.title: Prodigy's Sense
OKITASABER-PRODIGY_SENSE_POWER.descripti: #Whenever your 100 *Critical *Star threshold triggers: gain *NP Charge and draw 1 card.
OKITASABER-PRODIGY_SENSE_POWER.smartDesc: #Whenever your 100 *Critical *Star threshold triggers: gain *NP Charge and draw 1 card.
OKITASABER-THOUSAND_THRUSTS_POWER.title: Kata of a Thousand Thrusts

OKITASABER-SHINSENGUMI_WILL_POWER.title: Will of the Shinsengumi
OKITASABER-SHINSENGUMI_WILL_POWER.descri: #At the end of your turn, if you played 3+ Attacks: gain 5 Block and 20 *NP Charge.

OKITASABER-TO_THE_END_POWER.title: To the End

OKITASABER-BAKUMATSU_FLOWER_POWER.descri: #The illness has already won; she fights on regardless. Your *Dash cards no longer cost *Breath. At the end of each turn, gain a *Cough. This form is permanent.
